subject: [PATCH v4 16/21] swap: do not unnecesarily pin readahead swap entries

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with the patch's approach to readahead optimization and suggested a more comprehensive solution involving cluster-aware swap entry pinning.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch series optimizes swap readahead by avoiding unnecessary pinning of entries in the same virtual swap cluster as the target entry, reducing overhead and improving performance.
